microsoft_ft: Owned a **consumer-facing resilience product** end-to-end from ideation to launch, scaling Azure's recovery validation from a 2-person ops function into a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Set product vision and led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, authoring PRDs and self-service scheduling flows that **reduced user friction by 30%** and transitioned execution to an intuitive, self-service experience.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability by deeply understanding user pain points, shipping a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** that surfaced critical defects and set a new fairness/transparency bar.

Built alignment across engineering, data science, design, and partner teams on 14 cross-org executions under executive visibility, including bridge-leading a sovereign-cloud isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.

Communicated roadmaps, experiments, and decisions from IC partners to executive leadership, defining success metrics grounded in data analysis and user research to balance a flawless experience against two-sided marketplace needs.

Scaled team leverage through an **internal AI agent** and restructured planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% while managing ambiguity, complexity, and interdependencies.
microsoft_2023: Drove **customer discovery** through 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams to identify critical feature gaps, influencing the product roadmap to prioritize intent-based YAML generation.
Championed product adoption of AI-driven code generation by leading demos and training that **scaled utilization across 14 teams** and saved 37 engineering hours monthly.
Optimized data integrity and retrieval by setting metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, **cutting lookup time by 83%**.
microsoft_2022: Accelerated **$3M in revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by building alignment across 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework.
Led customer discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a roadmap targeting the highest-impact automation paths.
Enabled leadership decision-making by shipping a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, surfacing automation gaps and prioritization signals.
amazon_robotics: Delivered **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot migration by defining strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations in a high-ambiguity environment.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and improving team throughput.
Built alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to ship automated CI/CD pipelines, **accelerating deployment cycles by 25%** and reducing release friction.
pro_painters: Grew bookings **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing experience for 200+ monthly proposals, launching a new CRM process drivers and customers found intuitive.
Executed a digital-first GTM strategy optimizing the website and Google profile, **cutting CAC 13%** and lifting conversion 2.7% through data-driven experimentation.
Informed leadership pricing decisions by analyzing profitability across **1,000+ projects**, identifying margin leaks and recommending fixes adopted into the pricing model.

tailoring_notes: Reframed MSFT FT bullets around Lyft PM rubric: vision-setting, user empathy, two-sided marketplace tradeoffs, and exec communication.
Mirrored JD language (alignment, customer discovery, ambiguity, friction, intuitive/fair) and led with consumer/user-facing framing.
